query: SELECT id, name, hq, jurisdiction FROM platforms WHERE status = 'published' AND jurisdiction NOT LIKE '%cn%' AND jurisdiction NOT LIKE '%us%' AND jurisdiction NOT LIKE '%eu%' AND jurisdiction NOT LIKE '%other%' ORDER BY id LIMIT 20;
